title: Kielboul
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Kielboul." However, I think you may be referring to Kelp, Kiehl or possibly Kelp or possibly Kava Kombu or Kombu. 

If you are referring to Kelp, here's a paragraph about the plant:

Kelp is a type of brown seaweed that belongs to the family Laminariaceae. The health benefits of kelp include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and support thyroid function due to its rich content of iodine and other minerals. The bioactive constituents of kelp include fucoidan, laminarin, and other polysaccharides, as well as vitamins and minerals such as vitamin B12, iron, and zinc. Kelp is commonly used in various herbal preparations, including tea, capsules, and flakes, as well as in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as anemia and goiter.
